description_long: This is a compact, rectangular induction cooker with a sleek black surface and a single circular heating zone marked by concentric white rings. The top panel features a set of clearly labeled touch-sensitive controls, including power, timer, and temperature adjustment buttons, as well as a digital display area. The body is primarily constructed from smooth, heat-resistant plastic with a glass-ceramic cooktop, and it stands on four short, sturdy legs. A power cord extends from the rear side, indicating its electric operation. The front panel is adorned with a brand logo and various icons for operational modes. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for portable or countertop use in urban environments.
description: A modern, black induction cooker with a single heating zone, touch controls, and a visible power cord. The surface is smooth and features a digital display and brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with multiple touch buttons, digital display area, and brand logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile, side venting, and the power cord extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the power cord attachment and the back edge of the cooktop.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, control panel edge, and the power cord extending from the rear.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front edge, featuring a row of touch-sensitive buttons with icons and labels, a digital display area, and indicator lights. The buttons are arranged horizontally and are clearly separated by printed symbols.
